text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, just a little more... If I can just keep this
simmering until morning... on the night of... a full
moon...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'll have... the most... in...credib...le po...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although the fire fortunately went out on its own,
Sweep Tosho is upset that she burned her special
magic potion.
